title: Noah's travel journal
content:
Noah is studying journalism at university. He decides to take a gap year to explore some countries and cities that have always interested him.

He usually stays 13 days in each place. In each place, Noah makes some interesting observations.

We will now share 12 of these stories.


Press NEXT to continue…

title: Noah's travel journal
content:
For each of these stories, we will ask you to guess how widespread and morally acceptable the events in the story are, in the place Noah visits.Your task is to indicate on a 4-point scale how widespread and morally acceptable these events are:

  • '1' means that the events are very rare or completely unacceptable (depending on the question)
  • '4' means that the events are very common or completely acceptable (depending on the question)


Press NEXT to continue…

title: Noah's travel journal
content:
We are interested in your gut reaction, so please answer with the first idea that comes to your mind after reading the stories.


Press NEXT to continue…

stim1: What is the name of the person whose travel journal you are about to read?
feedback: 1: This is not correct, the experiment will end now.;2: This is correct.; 3: This is not correct, the experiment will end now.
